case_title: TODD CROSBY VS. SANTORI WOODWORKING, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-04-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANTORI WOODWORKING, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT SANTORI WOODWORKING, INC. SANTORI, SCOTT AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CROSBY, TODD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SANTORI WOODWORKING, INC. SANTORI, SCOTT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CROSBY, TODD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROSBY, TODD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTORI WOODWORKING, INC. SANTORI, SCOTT $306.87 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $441.87, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES FOR THE PORTION OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM THAT IS NOT BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
